title: Energy Management Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger energy management foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Energy Management Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Energy Management Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good energy management foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Energy Management Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
